tasks.title: clients.yml: deny_fields schema + parser
tasks.description: Extend internal/server/authz.go ClientIdentity struct with `DenyFields []string`. Update clients.yml example. Parser converts patterns into compiled matchers: exact "Type.field", glob "*.field", glob "Type.*". Unit tests cover each pattern type + invalid pattern rejection.

tasks.title: deny-field validator on AST
tasks.description: internal/schema/denyfields.go: walks a gqlparser AST, collects every (Type, field) selection (including via fragments + inline fragments + aliases — alias renames don't bypass), returns list of denied matches against the compiled matchers. Unit-tested against fixture queries.

tasks.title: wire deny-field check into query_validate + query_execute
tasks.description: Both tools call the new validator after the gqlparser pass. Violations return permission_denied envelope with `denied_fields` array. Audit chain Evidence records the deny match (effect=read, outcome=permission_denied). End-to-end tests cover deny → reject + non-deny → passthrough.

tasks.title: sqlite-vec extension load + fallback
tasks.description: internal/schema/store.go: attempt to load sqlite-vec extension on OpenStore; on failure, log + degrade to BM25-only. Schema gets an `embeddings` virtual table when vec is available. Tests cover both paths (extension present + missing).

tasks.title: on-disk embedding model via onnxruntime-go
tasks.description: internal/schema/embed.go: load all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (384-dim) from a pinned URL on first start; embed each SearchUnit at index time + each query at search time. Model file cached in IndexDir. Unit test embeds a fixed string and checks vector dimension + reproducibility.

tasks.title: hybrid BM25 + cosine ranker
tasks.description: Update Store.Search to compute hybrid score = α·BM25 + (1−α)·cosine; α configurable (default 0.5). Falls back to pure BM25 when embeddings disabled. Bench harness picks up automatically via fixture.

tasks.title: query_execute `select` arg + JMESPath projection
tasks.description: Add optional `select` string arg to query_execute. Post-execute, project the response body through jmespath.Parse; failures return invalid_select envelope. Audit chain captures the select expression.

tasks.title: query_execute auto-pagination via pageInfo
tasks.description: Add optional `paginate: {auto: bool, max_pages: int}` arg. When auto=true scry detects Relay-style pageInfo.hasNextPage + endCursor, re-issues the query with after: cursor, concatenates nodes[]. Respects cost ceiling — each page counts. max_pages clamps unbounded loops.

tasks.title: multi-arch ghcr image via goreleaser
tasks.description: Extend .goreleaser.yaml with `dockers:` for linux/amd64 + linux/arm64. Image runs as uid 1000, exposes 8080, HEALTHCHECK pings /healthz. Dockerfile cleanup: multi-stage, distroless base. CI workflow pushes to ghcr.io/felixgeelhaar/scry on tag.

tasks.title: charts/scry Helm chart
tasks.description: charts/scry/ with: Chart.yaml, values.yaml (image, replicas, resources, service.type, ingress, configMap for servers.yml/clients.yml, secret for token refs), templates/{deployment,service,configmap,secret,podmonitor}.yaml. helm lint + helm template golden snapshots in CI.

tasks.title: publish chart to gh-pages
tasks.description: GitHub Actions workflow that on release tag: `helm package charts/scry`, pushes to gh-pages branch under charts/, runs helm-docs to refresh README. Users install via helm repo add felixgeelhaar https://felixgeelhaar.github.io/scry.

tasks.title: deploy/k8s raw manifests for non-Helm users
tasks.description: deploy/k8s/{namespace,configmap,secret,deployment,service,ingress}.yaml. README in dir explains kubectl apply -k flow. Mirror Helm defaults so kustomize users can diff.

tasks.title: few-shot examples in every tool description
tasks.description: Audit registerQueryTools, registerSchemaTools, registerAuthTools, registerGateTools, registerRuntimeTools. Add a short examples block to each tool's description rendering one happy-path + one gotcha. Renderer: existing Description() call gets a multi-line string.

tasks.title: scry init interactive wizard
tasks.description: cmd/scry/init.go: prompts upstream URL, optional auth token (or env-ref), runs introspection probe via runtime.Manager, writes servers.yml with 0600 perms. Detects existing entries → replace/add/cancel prompt. Tests against in-memory fixture.

tasks.title: scry init --yes for scripted setup
tasks.description: Non-interactive mode: scry init --upstream URL --auth TOK --yes; suitable for CI / dotfiles bootstrap. Same write path as interactive but no prompts. Idempotent — existing entry replaced cleanly.

tasks.title: optional claude_desktop_config.json snippet writer
tasks.description: After init, scry prints a JSON snippet the operator can paste into Claude Desktop's config to register scry. With --install-mcp-config detects the OS-specific config path + appends a `scry` entry (atomic write with backup). Test: dry-run mode produces the right snippet for darwin + linux.

tasks.title: per-server pq.db: add name column
tasks.description: internal/pq/store.go: schema migration adds `name TEXT UNIQUE` column (nullable for backward compat). Update Add(hash, query, name?), GetByHash, GetByName, List. Tests cover: hash-only PQ still works; named PQ resolves by both; duplicate name rejected.

tasks.title: query_execute(name=...) + CLI flags
tasks.description: query_execute accepts `name` arg (mutually exclusive with `hash` and `query`). cmd/scry pq add --name <n> --query <q>. cmd/scry pq list renders name column. Envelope on conflict: pq_conflict with hint listing each provided ID.

tasks.title: cache_stats MCP tool
tasks.description: internal/server/cache_tools.go: registers cache_stats tool. Reads per-server cache stats (hit_count, miss_count, eviction_count, size_entries, oldest_entry_age). Admin-only authz. Returns JSON envelope. Unit-tested via fixture.

tasks.title: cache_purge MCP tool
tasks.description: Registers cache_purge tool. Optional `server` arg — empty = purge all. Admin-only. Returns envelope with per-server entries-purged count. permission_denied for read-only identities.

tasks.title: adjacency table on introspection
tasks.description: internal/schema/index.go: on every refresh, compute neighbor edges (Type X has fields returning Type Y → edge X→Y). Persist to a `neighbors(src TEXT, dst TEXT, kind TEXT)` table. Migration in store.go.

tasks.title: schema_neighbors MCP tool
tasks.description: Tool: schema_neighbors(server?, name) → JSON edge list {incoming: [...], outgoing: [...]}. Depth=1. Caps list lengths at 50 each to keep agent context budget friendly.

tasks.title: tenant field in clients.yml + per-tenant servers.yml
tasks.description: internal/server/authz.go: ClientIdentity gets a Tenant field. Loader looks for $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/scry/tenants/<tenant>.yml and merges over the base servers.yml (per-tenant takes precedence). Tests cover precedence + isolation.

tasks.title: http transport reads X-Scry-Tenant header
tasks.description: HTTP transport middleware extracts tenant header, threads it into context. resolveServer + every tool handler scopes by tenant. stdio stays single-tenant (no header to read). Tests cover: header present → scoped; header absent → default tenant; tenant A can't reach tenant B's servers.

tasks.title: per-tenant audit isolation
tasks.description: Audit dir layout becomes <auditdir>/<tenant>/<session>.jsonl. Gate session IDs prefixed with tenant. VerifyChain / gate_chain scoped per tenant. Backward compat: missing tenant falls back to "default".

tasks.title: oauth2 auth type + token source
tasks.description: internal/auth/oauth2.go: implements golang.org/x/oauth2/clientcredentials TokenSource keyed off client_id / client_secret / token_url / scopes. Caches the current access token in-memory; respects expires_in; background refresh refresh_skew seconds before expiry. Tests with httptest fake token endpoint.

tasks.title: wire oauth2 source into upstream client
tasks.description: internal/runtime/manager.go: AddConfig accepts a TokenSource. Existing static-bearer path keeps working (AuthToken populated). New path: when auth.type == oauth2, build a clientcredentials.Config and inject the TokenSource. In-flight requests during rotation get the new token transparently.

tasks.title: Store interface + sqlite + postgres impl
tasks.description: Refactor internal/schema/store.go: extract a Store interface (Replace, Search, GetSDL, Count, SetMeta, GetMeta). Existing sqlite impl moves to sqlitestore.go. New pgstore.go uses pgvector for embeddings + pg FTS for keyword search. Factory chooses driver from servers.yml storage block.

tasks.title: redis-backed cache.Cache impl
tasks.description: internal/cache: extract Cache interface (Get, Set, Delete, Purge, Stats). Existing in-memory impl moves to lrucache.go. New rediscache.go uses go-redis with per-key TTL. Selected via servers.yml storage.cache: redis. Tests cover both backends via the interface.

tasks.title: per-server webhooks.db persistence
tasks.description: internal/runtime/webhooks.go: webhook registrations stored at <indexdir>/<server>.webhooks.db (sqlite). Schema: id, url, secret, created_at. Register/Unregister/List API.

tasks.title: fire webhooks on schema_diff non-empty
tasks.description: After each successful refresh that produces a non-empty diff, dispatch HMAC-signed POST to every registered webhook. Retry with exp backoff 3 times on 5xx. Failed deliveries logged + counted in metrics (scry.webhook.failures_total).

tasks.title: schema_diff_subscribe + scry webhooks CLI
tasks.description: MCP tool schema_diff_subscribe(server, webhook_url) + scry webhooks list / remove CLI commands. Operator-only (admin authz). Returns the secret on creation only — never re-readable.

tasks.title: per-session + per-tenant usage counters
tasks.description: internal/usage/usage.go: in-memory + optional pg-persisted counters. Hooks: every tool call → increment tool_calls_total{tool, outcome}. Every upstream POST → record bytes + latency. Every successful query_execute → bill complexity + $$ from configurable cost table.

tasks.title: usage_stats MCP tool + /metrics endpoint
tasks.description: usage_stats tool returns the counter snapshot (operator-only). Prometheus collector at /metrics exposes the same numbers as labeled metrics. Tests cover both surfaces.

tasks.title: v0.7 CHANGELOG sweep + tag
tasks.description: CHANGELOG entry covering all 14 feature deliveries. Cut v0.7.0 tag. Confirm goreleaser publishes binaries + ghcr image + Helm chart in lockstep.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG sweep + tag v0.5.0
tasks.description: Promote Unreleased → ## 0.5.0 - YYYY-MM-DD. Note coverage delta (server: 33% → X%). Document the mutation testing approach + the public-endpoint findings. `make verify && go test -tags=live,stdio_smoke ./...` clean. Tag v0.5.0 + push. Brew tap should auto-bump (HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN now wired since v0.4.1).

tasks.title: Emit each Evidence record as an OTel log
tasks.description: internal/obs/audit.go: thin wrapper that converts an Evidence record to an OTel LogRecord (timestamp, body=summary, attrs={server, effect, complexity, outcome, query_hash, response_hash, chain_hash, session}). Init in cmd/scry/main.go alongside tracer + meter; honour OTEL_LOGS_EXPORTER (none|otlp|stdout). Gate.Record gains a single Emit() call after the existing append path so JSONL stays the durable local copy. Tests: stdout exporter renders each record; no-op provider absorbs silently; redaction — no raw query/response bodies in attrs (hashes only).

tasks.title: Wire fortify rate limiter per server
tasks.description: Add rate_limit.rps + rate_limit.burst to servers.yml. Layer fortify's rate-limit middleware onto upstream.Client.http chain. On reject, surface structured rate_limited envelope with retry_after. Tests: under-limit passes, over-limit rejects with correct envelope, per-server isolation (one upstream throttled doesn't affect another).

tasks.title: scaffold docs/benchmarks/github-v4 + Makefile
tasks.description: Create docs/benchmarks/github-v4/ with subdirs baseline/, scry/, results/. Top-level Makefile targets: bench (runs both), bench-baseline, bench-scry, bench-clean. README.md placeholder with repro instructions (env vars, prerequisites). go.mod or pyproject.toml depending on runner language (decide: Python preferred for fast scripting with anthropic SDK + httpx; Go acceptable if reusing scry's mcp-go client).

tasks.title: README.md with numbers + go/no-go decision
tasks.description: docs/benchmarks/github-v4/README.md: prerequisites, env vars, one-line `make bench` repro. Embed the summary table from v06-bench-metrics-harness. Explicit go/no-go interpretation: if scry success rate >= 85% and token compression >= 10x, ship the HN/Apollo Slack drop with this README screenshot. If below either threshold, v0.7 plan grounded in the observed failure modes — likely candidates: embedding-backed schema_search, always-envelope response shape, examples in tool docstrings. Update top-level README.md to link the benchmark.

tasks.title: Schema diff alerts + schema_diff MCP tool
tasks.description: internal/schema/diff.go: compare two *Schema instances, return added/removed/changed type names with a kind flag (additive vs breaking). runtime.refreshEntry calls Diff() against the previous SDL, persists last-N diffs in meta, emits log + metric `scry.schema.changes_total{kind}`. New MCP tool schema_diff(server, limit) returns the last N diffs. Tests: identical schemas → empty diff; added field → additive; removed field → breaking; changed required arg → breaking.

tasks.title: Race-stress harness for hot-reload + Gate concurrency
tasks.description: Build-tagged (`stress`) test under internal/server/. Spawn N concurrent goroutines: half issuing query_execute against fakeUpstream, quarter rewriting servers.yml to trigger Replace(), quarter calling g.Record on shared session. Run for 30s; -race must report 0 races + 0 fatals. CI workflow: nightly job (cron) that runs the stress tag; not blocking on PR.

tasks.title: Unit tests for schema_search / schema_get / query_validate / query_cost / schema_diff
tasks.description:
internal/server/schema_tools_test.go (new). Same direct-handler-invocation pattern as v05-server-query-execute-coverage. Cover:
 - schema_search: empty results, populated results, subgraph column rendering on/off
 - schema_get: hit, ErrNotFound envelope
 - query_validate: ok + errors
 - query_cost: ok + errors propagated
 - schema_diff: no-diff (no_diff envelope), populated diff
 - resolveServer: single-server default, multi-server no name, multi-server known name, multi-server unknown name

tasks.title: Custom auth header + scheme per server
tasks.description: Add auth.header_name + auth.scheme to auth.Server (servers.yml) + Client (clients.yml). Thread through upstream.Client.SetAuth so hot reload swaps without restart. Empty scheme = no prefix. Tests: bearer (default), X-API-Key (no scheme), Token <T> (custom scheme), refresh-on-reload.

tasks.title: scry-routed agent runner
tasks.description: scry/runner.py. Spawns scry as MCP subprocess pointed at GitHub v4 (scry serve --upstream https://api.github.com/graphql --auth env://GITHUB_TOKEN). Builds a Claude conversation with NO SDL in system prompt — only the canonical task. Wires Claude's MCP client to scry's stdio. Agent must call schema_search → query_validate → query_execute. Same 10 trials, same metrics, results/scry.jsonl. Crucial: keep the agent's task prompt identical to baseline so only the schema-access path varies.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG sweep + tag v0.2.0
tasks.description: Move every v0.2 commit from CHANGELOG.md `Unreleased` into a `## 0.2.0 - YYYY-MM-DD` section grouped by Added/Changed/Fixed/Security. Update README badges if version-pinned. Confirm `make verify && go test -tags=live,stdio_smoke ./...` clean. Tag v0.2.0 + push. Release workflow publishes; if HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN now in repo secrets, the brew formula bump fires too.

tasks.title: Adopt mcp-go ToolFilter once #90 ships (or upstream the PR)
tasks.description: Check status of mcp-go #90 weekly through v0.2 cycle. If merged + released: bump dep, swap internal/server/tool_filter.go for the upstream-provided `mcp.ToolFilter(predicate) Middleware`, delete the wrapper. If still open at v0.2 freeze: open a PR against mcp-go ourselves with the internal/server/tool_filter.go implementation refactored to use typed handler internals. Acceptance: scry doesn't ship its own tool-list filter middleware by v0.2.0.

tasks.title: Detect Apollo federated upstreams + tag subgraphs in search
tasks.description: 1) schema.IntrospectFederation(): probe `{ _service { sdl } }` after the normal introspection; on success, parse the returned SDL with @key/@external directive awareness. 2) schema.SearchUnit gains a Subgraph string field. 3) runtime.refreshEntry calls federation probe; populates Subgraph on each unit when present. 4) renderSearchResults shows subgraph in markdown table. 5) Test: stub upstream returning federated SDL → units carry subgraph; non-federated upstream → Subgraph empty (no regression).

tasks.title: Wire cache hit/miss counters into query_execute
tasks.description: Add ScryMeters.CacheHits + ScryMeters.CacheMisses Int64Counter, dimensioned by server label. Increment from query_execute right after cache.Get returns hit/miss (only for effect=read; mutations don't touch cache). Test: hit/miss recorded with correct outcome + server attribute. Update README observability section to list the new metrics.

tasks.title: keychain:// token-ref via 99designs/keyring
tasks.description: Add ResolveToken case for keychain://service.account refs. Use 99designs/keyring (cross-platform: macOS Keychain, libsecret, Windows DPAPI). On keyring-unavailable error: return clear hint pointing operator to file:// fallback. Tests: parse keychain:// ref, mock keyring backend with table-driven cases, headless fallback path emits actionable error.

tasks.title: Audit JSONL size-based rotation with chain continuity
tasks.description: Add --audit-max-size (50MiB default) + --audit-keep (5 default). On rollover: rename <session>.jsonl→<session>.jsonl.1, shift older suffixes, open new .jsonl. Critical: chain hash continuity across files — first record of new file uses last record's ChainHash of .jsonl.1 as prev. VerifyChain must verify across the whole sequence. Tests: rollover triggers at threshold, chain verifies end-to-end across 5+ rotations, keep-N truncates oldest.

tasks.title: mTLS subject CN → MCP Identity middleware
tasks.description: 1) internal/server/mtls_identity.go: HTTP middleware that reads req.TLS.PeerCertificates[0]. If non-empty: build Identity{ID: subjectCN, Name: subjectCN}, store via mcp.ContextWithIdentity. 2) buildServeOpts wires this middleware BEFORE BearerAuth so mTLS identity takes precedence when both are presented. 3) Tests: synthesised request with PeerCertificates → identity in context matches CN; no cert → middleware no-ops, BearerAuth proceeds; both cert + bearer → cert wins.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG sweep + tag v0.4.0
tasks.description: Move v0.4 work from Unreleased into dated section. Added/Changed groups. README badge updates if version-pinned. `make verify && go test -tags=live,stdio_smoke ./...` clean. Tag v0.4.0 + push. Release workflow auto-publishes via goreleaser.

tasks.title: Fuzz harness for ParseSDL, gate.Classify, cache.Key
tasks.description: Three FuzzXxx funcs in their respective packages: FuzzParseSDL (random bytes → ParseSDL must not panic), FuzzClassify (random strings → Classify always returns one of three Effects), FuzzCacheKey (random inputs → Key is deterministic + collision-free for distinct inputs). Build-tagged via go test -fuzz pattern. Nightly CI workflow (.github/workflows/fuzz.yml) runs each for 5min. Crashers go into testdata/fuzz/<func>/.

tasks.title: scry doctor diagnostic CLI
tasks.description: New subcommand `scry doctor`. Probes per server: upstream reachability (HEAD or empty POST), introspection mode (cached meta), auth status (reuses StatusAll), audit-dir perms (0700 + per-file 0600), OTel exporter connectivity when OTEL_TRACES_EXPORTER set, scope sanity check (clients.yml validates). One-line verdict per check, color-coded console. Exit code = sum of failed checks. Tests: each probe has its own unit test against a stub state; integration test runs `doctor` against a healthy fixture and asserts exit 0 + against a broken fixture and asserts non-zero.

tasks.title: Adopt mcp-go ToolFilter when #92 ships
tasks.description: Watch mcp-go #92 throughout v0.3 cycle. On merge + release: bump dep, replace internal/server/tool_filter.go with `mcp.WithMiddleware(mcp.ToolFilter(mayList))` one-liner, delete the wrapper + tool_filter_test.go (replaced by mcp-go's coverage). If unmerged at freeze: skip, document, file follow-up. Bonus stretch: open mcp-go ResourceFilter + PromptFilter PRs.

tasks.title: results aggregation + comparison table
tasks.description: results/aggregate.py reads baseline.jsonl + scry.jsonl, produces summary.md: side-by-side table (avg input tokens, avg output tokens, p50/p95 latency, success rate, $$ per trial at Claude Sonnet 4.5 pricing, token compression ratio). Computes the headline number: tokens saved per task. Output also as raw summary.json for downstream consumption. Run via `make bench-summary`.

tasks.title: Unit tests for every query_execute outcome envelope
tasks.description:
internal/server/query_execute_test.go (new). Build a test harness that registers query_execute against a fake mcp.Server + fake runtime.Manager with one Entry whose Cache/PQ/Client are injectable. Drive the handler closure directly via the registered tool's Handler func. Assert envelope shape + recorded gate evidence + metric counters per outcome:
 - invalid_query: ValidateQuery returns errors
 - cost_exceeded: complexity > cost ceiling
 - budget_exceeded: pre-fill gate write counter to max
 - unknown_server: missing server name + multi-server manager
 - permission_denied: read-only identity in ctx
 - permission_denied_server: clients.yml scope rejects server
 - auth_expired: fake upstream returns 401
 - upstream_error: fake upstream returns 500
 - rate_limited: rate-limit transport rejects
 - pq_not_found: hash with no registered entry
 - pq_conflict: both query + hash set
 - ok_cached: pre-populate entry.Cache
 - ok: full success path
Lifts internal/server coverage from 33% toward 60%.

tasks.title: End-to-end mutation integration via httptest fake
tasks.description:
internal/server/mutation_test.go (new). Boot a httptest server that:
 - serves a minimal introspection response so refreshEntry succeeds
 - on POST: parse the query, if it's `mutation Inc { increment }` increment an atomic counter + return {data:{increment:N}}
 - otherwise return {data: null}
Then exercise: build a Manager pointing at it; register tools; call query_execute via the handler closure with a mutation query; assert:
 - the fake's counter incremented exactly once
 - cache bypass: a second identical mutation call also hits the fake (counter=2)
 - gate write budget: with MaxWritesPerSession=1, the second call returns budget_exceeded + counter STAYS at 1 (gate rejects before upstream)
 - audit chain: g.Chain(session)[0].Effect == "write" + Outcome == "ok"
 - docs comment lists the public GraphQL endpoints checked (countries, swapi, pokeapi) + why none support live mutation smoke (read-only); a docker-compose-based local Hasura is the future path for a live mutation tag.

tasks.title: Docker + systemd + Kubernetes deployment artefacts
tasks.description: Three new files: docs/deployment/docker.md + Dockerfile (multi-stage, distroless final, non-root UID, ENTRYPOINT scry serve); docs/deployment/systemd.md + scry.service template with PrivateTmp/ProtectSystem=strict/NoNewPrivileges/ReadWritePaths-pin-to-audit-dir; docs/deployment/kubernetes.md + manifests/k8s/{deployment,configmap,secret,service,hpa}.yaml with readiness probe = `scry doctor`, resource limits, run-as non-root, fsGroup for audit volume. Smoke: docker build succeeds, image runs `scry version`. k8s manifests apply on kind cluster.

tasks.title: encode the realistic agent task
tasks.description: Define the canonical benchmark task: 'find every PR I opened that touched file <X> in the last 30 days, return title + reviewer + merge status'. Encode as a fixed natural-language prompt the agent receives. Define the ground-truth answer for evaluation: a static fixture of expected PRs derived from a fixed query against GitHub at benchmark-record time (pinned via repo + date range so re-runs are deterministic). Ground truth lives in fixtures/expected.json.

tasks.title: baseline: full-SDL-in-system-prompt agent
tasks.description: baseline/runner.py (or .go). Loads the GitHub v4 SDL (downloaded once via introspection, committed to fixtures/github-v4.sdl). Builds a Claude conversation with the SDL in the system prompt + the canonical task. Lets the model emit a GraphQL query via tool-use; executes against GitHub v4 with GITHUB_TOKEN; returns response. Loops 10 trials. Captures per-trial: input_tokens, output_tokens, latency_ms, returned_answer, matches_ground_truth (bool). Writes results/baseline.jsonl.

tasks.title: Audit chain anchor sidecar closes truncation gap
tasks.description: Write <session>.anchor next to the JSONL files holding the ChainHash of the oldest-still-retained record. On rotation truncation, refresh the anchor to point at the new oldest record. On load, read the anchor and use it as the initial prev-hash so VerifyChain succeeds end-to-end even after archives drop. Tests: keep=3 truncate-then-verify case from v0.2's TestAuditRotationKeepTruncatesAndDocumentsBoundary now passes cleanly; anchor file 0600 perms; missing anchor falls back to current behaviour (genesis prev="").

tasks.title: Persisted query storage + CLI + tool integration
tasks.description: 1) internal/pq package: per-server hash→query Store backed by SQLite (reuse schema.Store DB; add `pq` table). Get(hash), Put(name, query), Delete(hashOrName), List(). 2) cmd/scry/pq.go: subcommand wiring `scry pq add/list/remove <server>`. 3) internal/server/query_tools.go: ExecuteInput gains `Hash` string; mutually exclusive with `Query`. On hash: pq.Get → forward as query. Audit chain records both hash + query_hash (so external auditors can correlate). 4) Tests: roundtrip via CLI, hash lookup in execute, missing hash returns pq_not_found envelope, conflict (both args) rejected.

tasks.title: CHANGELOG sweep + tag v0.3.0
tasks.description: Promote Unreleased into ## 0.3.0 section. Add/Changed/Fixed groups. README badge updates if version-pinned. Final `make verify && go test -tags=live,stdio_smoke ./...`. Tag v0.3.0 + push. Release workflow auto-publishes; if HOMEBREW_TAP_TOKEN now in repo secrets, brew formula bumps too.

tasks.title: TTL query result cache
tasks.description: internal/cache package with TTL-bounded Get/Set per upstream entry. Key = SHA-256(query|variables|operationName). Wired into query_execute: bypass for effect=write, otherwise check cache before upstream call. On hit: recordOutcome("ok_cached", ...), gate.Record with outcome=ok_cached so chain stays accurate, return cached body. On miss: run upstream + Set on success. Operator knobs: --cache-ttl (default 30s, 0 disables), --cache-max-entries (default 1000). Metric: `scry.cache.{hits,misses}_total{server}`. Tests: TTL expiry, mutation bypass, max-entries LRU eviction, hit + miss metrics, audit chain contains cached entries.
